name: Sakura Cloud
description: Sakura Internets IaaS — Japan-native VM, object storage, archive and GPU servers with Terraform provider.

seo.title: Sakura Cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Sakura Cloud: Sakura Internets IaaS — Japan-native VM, object storage, archive and GPU servers with Terraform provider.

when_to_use: Japan-native IaaS with GPU servers and Terraform support
Object storage and archive for Japanese enterprise workloads
Kubernetes clusters with Japanese data residency guarantees
Low-cost cloud for Japanese indie developers and startups
Compliance-first Japanese cloud for healthcare and government

review.verdict: Reliable Japanese IaaS for local workloads, but don't expect hyperscaler breadth or global POPs.
review.best_for: Japanese developers and enterprises wanting local IaaS with Terraform support
review.not_for: Global products, modern serverless needs, or non-Japanese teams
